summary: Completed testing of Customer Details modal feature - all backend APIs and frontend UI functionality working correctly

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody. This is a React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/customers/{customer_id} returns customer details (200)
Backend API - GET /api/customers/{customer_id} returns 404 for non-existent customer
Backend API - GET /api/transactions/{customer_id} returns transactions list
Backend API - GET /api/transactions/{customer_id} returns empty list for customers without transactions
Backend API - POST /api/transactions creates new transaction
Backend API - Authentication required for customer and transaction endpoints
Frontend - Login with admin@wisedrive.com / admin123 works
Frontend - Navigate to Customers page works
Frontend - Click 'Details' link opens Customer Details modal
Frontend - Modal displays customer info (name, mobile, city, payment status)
Frontend - Transaction History table shows transactions with Order ID, Type, Car Details, Payment Date, Amount, Status
Frontend - Close button closes the modal
Frontend - X button closes the modal
Frontend - Customers without transactions show 'No transactions found' message
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about HTML hydration error (<tr> cannot be child of <span>) - low priority, doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Customers 1-10 have transactions seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Details modal feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs /api/customers/{id} and /api/transactions/{customer_id} work correctly. Frontend modal opens from 'Details' link in Customers table and displays customer info + transaction history.
